meta.community_description: A space to share experiences, ask questions and connect with other people.
meta.new_thread_description: Start a conversation with the community.
meta.stories_description: A safe space to share real experiences anonymously. Read other people’s stories and share yours.

page.title: Shared space
page.description: A place to share experiences, open conversations and learn from other people.
page.upgrade_prompt: Upgrade to <link>Flavia Plus</link> to create conversations and invite Flavia to share her perspective.
page.empty_stories: No stories published yet. Be the first to share.
page.empty_threads: No conversations yet. Be the first to start one.

new_thread.title: Start a topic
new_thread.description: Share a question, thought or experience. The community is here to listen.

thread_form.title_placeholder: What would you like to talk about?
thread_form.body_placeholder: Share your experience, question, or thought...
thread_form.success_moderated_description: It will be visible once approved by the team.
thread_form.success_description: It's now visible in the community.

invite_flavia.done: Flavia already participated in this conversation
invite_flavia.idle: Invite Flavia to share her opinion

stories.page_description: Sharing your experience can help someone else. Here's a safe space to do it — anonymously if you prefer.
stories.empty: No stories published yet. Be the first to share.
stories.form_placeholder: Share whatever you want. No rules, just your experience.
stories.form_anonymous_hint_on: Your story will be shown without any identifying information.
stories.form_anonymous_hint_off: Your name or account email will be displayed.
stories.form_success_description: Your story can help others feel less alone.
